problems.title: Global Keyword
problems.description: Modify a global variable 'x' inside a function using the global keyword. Expected output: Global x: 15, Outside x: 15
problems.prompt: Modify a global variable 'x' inside a function using the global keyword. Expected output: Global x: 15, Outside x: 15

problems.title: globals() Function
problems.description: Access and modify a global variable 'x' inside a function in the presence of a local variable with the same name. Expected output: Local x: 15, Global x: 10, Modified Global x: 20
problems.prompt: Access and modify a global variable 'x' inside a function in the presence of a local variable with the same name. Expected output: Local x: 15, Global x: 10, Modified Global x: 20
